role_title: Senior Associate, Strategy & Operations, DoorDash for Business Logistics

level_signals: 3–5 years of experience in strategy & operations, logistics, management consulting, or a high-growth marketplace environment
Title is Senior Associate, reporting to Senior Manager
Base range $87K–$128K nationally consistent with mid-senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 3–5 years of experience in strategy & operations, logistics, management consulting, or a high-growth marketplace environment.
You have a track record of owning operational problems end-to-end—from diagnosis to testing to rollout—and are comfortable building from scratch in ambiguous, early-stage environments.
You're analytically strong: you write SQL, work fluently with data, and know how to get to the root cause and turn complexity into clear recommendations.
You demonstrate fluency with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar) to automate workflows, surface insights, and drive faster, better decisions.
You communicate with clarity and influence—you can tailor your message for Dashers, operators, cross-functional partners, and senior leadership alike.
You love getting into the weeds—you'll happily roll up your sleeves, get to the lowest level of detail, and run the test yourself to find out what works.

scope.surface: DoorDash for Business Catering — Dasher and delivery experience for large, high-stakes catering orders
scope.business_model: B2B corporate dining and benefits platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Dasher quality for catering (accuracy of drop-off and setup)
Scalability of operational fixes and automated workflows
core_responsibilities: Own Dasher quality for catering—on-time arrival, accurate drop-off and setup, and a clean handoff
Figure out how catering deliveries should actually work—Dasher selection, batching, timing, equipment, and handoff—by testing different approaches
Dig into individual deliveries, talk to Dashers and customers, and trace exactly where things break down
Build automated workflows using AI to surface where catering deliveries break down and turn manual analysis into repeatable processes
Translate ground-level learnings into clear product and operational recommendations for the product roadmap

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed ($87K–$128K base nationally)
Flexible remote or hybrid arrangement per candidate preference
Clear product surface and early-stage ownership opportunity
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis — no hard deadline pressure
red_flags: Pay range is fairly wide ($41K spread), which could indicate significant location-based adjustment or leveling uncertainty
Early-stage, ambiguous scope ('building from scratch') may mean limited infrastructure support

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, years range, and comp)
location.cities_listed (no specific cities tied to this role stated; body says remote or hybrid by preference)
ambiguities: Location type: JD body says 'can work remotely or hybrid depending preference' — treated as hybrid with remote eligibility, but could effectively be fully remote for some candidates. No specific city listed for this role.

Years range '3–5 years' is framed as what the company is 'excited about' rather than under an explicit 'Required' header; treated as hard given the unconditional framing in a 'What we look for' equivalent section.
No nice-to-haves section exists in the JD; all listed attributes are treated as must-haves.
